item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-n04","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response stayed in direct decision analysis, treated the prompt as metric trend/risk evaluation, and did not invoke triage or a repeated-local-repair framework. It gave a clear recommendation not to stop the old plan immediately, identified the complaint gap as the gating risk, and proposed bounded rollout and diagnosis steps."}
